question.text:
Dear Allegro Support team,

 

This is a friendly reminder.

Your assistance will be highly appreciated.

 

Best regards, 

Saori IWATA

EQC/Operation – As agents for CU LINES

Ben Line Agencies – Tokyo, Japan

Tel +81 3 6718 0741

saori.iwata@benline.com <mail

www.benlineagencies.com <http://www.benlineagencies.com/> 


Subject: RE: Request to Restore Booking No. CULVNGO2600109, CULVNGO2600121 and CULVNGO2600108

 

///Adding Allegro suppor
question.summary: Dear Allegro Support team, This is a friendly reminder. Your assistance will be highly appreciated. ...

answer.text:
Dear Saori

With the current DDS logic, once a booking is cancelled, it will be removed from the batch calculation list.
So for these bookings, the solution is to temporarily restore the booking after MT is generated, manually refresh the DDS calculation, and then cancel it again once the calculation is completed.


Kind regards,

 

Kieran Ji / 季胤喆

System Engineer

Digital & IT Department

Mobile: +86-17701880547 <tel:+14707390496> 

E-mail: kieranji@culines.com <mail

Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/> 



 


Date: Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 08:26

Cc: Document Center1
